name: Do I need a lawyer for my chemical dermatitis claim from work in Boise?
description: No, but yes for best results on proof-heavy claims like Idaho occupational diseases.[2]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for my chemical dermatitis claim from work in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, but yes for best results on proof-heavy claims like Idaho occupational diseases.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Not required, but highly recommended for occupational disease claims requiring complex causation proof.[2] Idaho claimants bear the full burden of evidence.[2] Key factors: Lawyers handle filings, appeals, negotiations; no upfront fees in workers' comp; boost success odds.[2] If denied or complicated, contact one immediately. Self-filing risks mistakes on proof.
